# AXON

> Premium ecosystem of Telegram bots — studio-grade music streaming, AI moderation, and deep community analytics for modern communities.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the AXON Telegram bot ecosystem.
- [Explore](/explore): Browse all bots — music, AI, security, analytics, and utility.
- [Features](/features): Capabilities across audio, intelligence, moderation, and analytics.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Pro, and Enterprise plans.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Preview the unified command center.
- [About](/about): Team, mission, and contact.

## Bots

- [Axon Audio](/bots/axon-audio): Studio-grade music streaming for Telegram voice chats.
- [Sentinel AI](/bots/sentinel-ai): AI moderation that stops raids before they start.
- [Lumina AI](/bots/lumina): GPT-4 and Claude inside every group chat.
